title: XYZ Scythes
description: Mod adding 5 new weapons each with unique abilities
body:
Mod adding 5 unique scythes all with a special ability. Each scythe is crafted with purely vanilla resources to try to stay a bit more vanilla.

All scythes come with sweeping edge built in and therefore can not be enchanted with it. The level of sweeping edge is based on how hard the scythe is to craft.

Damage and attack speed have been scaled between axes and swords.


## New Scythes

- Iron Scythe
- Nether Scythe
- Sculk Scythe
- Blood Scythe
- Ender Scythe
 

Scythe abilities:


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

R = Right click

C = Ctrl + Right click

 

Iron R = Clear surrounding foliage

 

Nether R = Shoot a firecharge

Nether C = Shoot a ghast sized fire ball

 

Sculk R = Shoot a sonic blast dealing high damage

Sculk C = Apply glowing to all nearby glowing entities (including those behind walls)

 

Blood R = Shoot a wave of blood out, cleansing yourself of any potion effects and applying them to anyone hit for 5 seconds

Blood C = Pull all surrounding entities towards you

 

Ender R = Throw an ender pearl

Ender C = Open a menu allowing instant creation of nether portal or can teleport you to your spawn point or the end.


</details>


 

Iron Scythe Recipe:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![Iron hoe recipe shifted to the right with an extra iron ingot in the middle left slot](https://i.imgur.com/HLsiM7S.png)
- 3 Iron Ingots
- 2 Sticks

</details>


 

Nether Scythe Recipe:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![Iron scythe top left with gold ingot to its right and below it. Firecharge in top right with 2 blaze rods below it](https://i.imgur.com/kzEJhHq.png)
- 1 Iron Scythe
- 2 Gold Ingots
- 1 Fire Charge
- 2 Blaze Rods

</details>


 

Sculk Scythe Recipe:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![Iron scythe top left with a diamond to the right and below, Sculk shriker top right with 2 echo shards below](https://i.imgur.com/2vd4coQ.png)
- 1 Iron Scythe
- 2 Diamonds
- 1 Sculk Shrieker
- 2 Echo Shards

</details>


 

Blood Scythe Recipe:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![Sculk scythe in top left with netherite ingot to the right and below, Dragon's breath in top right with 2 creeping vines below](https://i.imgur.com/uRI737e.png)
- 1 Sculk Scythe
- 2 Netherite Ingots
- 1 Dragon's Breath
- 2 Weeping Vines

</details>


 

Ender Scythe Recipe:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![Blood Scythe top left with netherite ingot to right and below, Ender pearl top left with 2 end rods below](https://i.imgur.com/Axya4CM.png)
- 1 Blood Scythe
- 2 Netherite Ingots
- 1 Ender Pearl
- 2 End Rods

</details>
